# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The latest published release on the `main` branch is supported.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Email **eugene@trtk.me** with the subject `guardrail3 security report`.

Please include:

- A description of the issue and its impact
- Steps to reproduce, ideally a minimal example
- Affected versions
- Your name and contact info for follow-up

Expect an acknowledgment within 5 business days. We will work with you on a fix and coordinated disclosure.

Do not file a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.
